Program

A preliminary program is below. All events take place on the UC Berkeley campus.

Fri, Oct 23 1 pm-5 pm Technical talks (3010 Banatao Auditorium)
5 pm-7 pm Reception (1015 Evans Hall)
Sat, Oct 24 9 am-5 pm Technical talks (306 Soda Hall)
7 pm-10 pm Banquet (Faculty Club)

The following speakers have confirmed their participation:

  • Grey Ballard, Sandia
  • Austin Benson, Stanford
  • Jeff Bilmes, UW
  • Erin Carson, NYU
  • Alan Edelman, MIT
  • David Garmire, U Hawaii
  • Laura Grigori, INRIA
  • Greg Henry, Intel
  • Cho-Jui Hsieh, UT Austin
  • Bo Kåström, Umea
  • Jiawang Nie, UCSD
  • Michael Overton, NYU
  • Horst Simon, LBNL
  • Edgar Solominik, ETH Zurich
  • Joel Tropp, Caltech
  • Richard Vuduc, GA Tech
